signals.headline: TRUMP NOMINATES KEVIN WARSH TO SUCCEED JEROME POWELL AS FED CHAIR** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]
signals.raw:
TRUMP NOMINATES KEVIN WARSH TO SUCCEED JEROME POWELL AS FED CHAIR** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]

President Trump announced Kevin Warsh, a former Fed governor, as his nominee to replace Jerome Powell, whose term ends in May; this ends months of speculation and follows Trump's January Truth Social post criticizing Powell[1][2].
